case_title: TOM LEUNG VS. IGOR A ZUBKO

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-22-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
DEMAND FOR JURY TRIAL AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT ZUBKO, IGOR A ANDREYCHIKOVA, VICTORIA (SUED AS ANDREYCHIKOV)

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT IGOR ZUBKO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. IGOR A ZUBKO HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. LAW AND MOTION, 301, THERE BEING NO COMPLIANCE WITH THE TENTATIVE RULING RULE, DEFENDANT VICTORIA ANDREYCHIKOVA'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS WAS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Dec-22-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tom Huster of the Huster Law Group, 221-5490, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT IGOR ZUBKO'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS is denied. 5 days to respond to complaint. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/PM) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR# 11604

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Dec-21-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Victoria Andreychikova, 221-1292, defendant appearing in propria persona

No other appearances on this matter. There being no compliance with the tentative ruling rule, DEFENDANT VICTORIA ANDREYCHIKOVA'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS was taken off calendar without prejudice. Defendant has 5 days to respond to the complaint. (301/PJB) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR# 11604
